auth.emptyFieldsError: Please enter your email and password.

compose.subject: Subject
compose.bodyRequired: Please enter a subject or body.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.description: An unexpected error occurred. Please refresh the page or try again later.

drive.duplicateFileError: A file with the same name already exists. Rename or remove the existing file and try again.
drive.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete? This cannot be undone. Continue?
drive.emptyTrashConfirm: Empty trash will permanently delete {count} items. Continue?
drive.uploadTooltip: Click: upload files, Shift+click: upload folder

uploadModal.title: File upload
uploadModal.descResumable: Large files are split into chunks for parallel processing; interrupted uploads continue from where they left off.
uploadModal.descNonResumable: If support is limited, automatically falls back to full-file upload.
uploadModal.footerHint: Adding files appends to the queue. Folder drops are handled as-is.

drive.emptyFolderHint: Drag files here or click the upload button

filterRules.sectionDesc: Automatically apply actions to incoming mail that matches conditions. Evaluated top to bottom.
filterRules.noRules: No filter rules. Add a new rule below.
filterRules.infoNote: Filter rules apply to newly fetched mail and are saved in this browser and server settings.
filterRules.stopProcessing: Stop processing subsequent rules after this rule

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication setup required
mfa.description: Your administrator requires MFA for this account. To continue, please register an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).

composeFooter.sendAndArchiveDesc: Move original mail to archive after sending
composeFooter.sendAndArchiveAria: Send and archive, move original mail to archive after sending

quickReply.hint: Ctrl+Enter to send · Escape to cancel

settingsModal.threadViewDesc: Group messages with the same subject into a single conversation.
settingsModal.showPreviewDesc: Show a snippet of the body in the message list.
settingsModal.autoSaveDraftDesc: Periodically auto-save the draft while composing.

management.confirmDelete: Deleting "{name}" will also delete all of its events. Continue?

event.recurringDesc: This change will apply to all events that share the same recurrence rule.
event.endBeforeStart: End time must be after start time

items.addTodo: Add this mail as a task

orgPicker.selectOrgHint: Select an organization on the left
orgPicker.selectBookHint: Select an address book on the left
orgPicker.includeChildren: Include sub-organizations when picking an org

driveShare.title: Share link — {name}
driveShare.regenerateRequiredTitle: For security the full URL is shown only at creation. Create a new link to copy it.

mailListFull.inboxZeroDesc: You've processed all mail. Take a moment to relax.

contacts.noContacts: No contacts yet. Add a new one.
contacts.deleteBookConfirm: Delete address book "{name}"? All contacts in it will also be deleted.

settingsView.displayNameDesc: Shown as sender name when you send mail
settingsView.emailAddressDesc: Contact your administrator to change this
settingsView.recoveryEmailDesc: Personal email for password reset links
settingsView.pwMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settingsView.pwChanged: Password changed. Please sign in again.
settingsView.convModeDesc: Group mails with the same subject into a single conversation
settingsView.compactViewDesc: Reduce row height to show more mails on screen
settingsView.previewTextDesc: Show the first line of the body in the list
settingsView.groupByDateDesc: Group the list by Today / Yesterday / Last 7 days, etc.
settingsView.importanceMarkersDesc: Show category chips (notification, newsletter, etc.) on auto-classified mail
settingsView.focusModeDesc: Show only starred / pinned / unread mail to focus on what matters
settingsView.swipeLeftDesc: Action when swiping left in the mail list
settingsView.swipeRightDesc: Action when swiping right in the mail list
settingsView.readMarkDesc: When to mark a mail as read after opening
settingsView.externalImagesDesc: How images loaded from external servers are shown. 'Block' prevents senders from tracking reads
settingsView.inlineImagePreviewDesc: Show attached images below the mail body
settingsView.smartReplyDesc: Analyze content to suggest frequently used reply phrases
settingsView.readingTimeDesc: Show estimated reading time in the mail list
settingsView.readingPaneDesc: Place the reading pane on the right or at the bottom
settingsView.sendDelayDesc: Wait after pressing send before actually delivering. You can 'Undo' within that time
settingsView.quoteOnReplyDesc: Include the original mail when replying or forwarding
settingsView.fontSizeDefaultDesc: Default font size for new messages
settingsView.confirmBeforeSendDesc: Show a dialog to confirm recipients, subject, and attachments before sending
settingsView.ccSelfDesc: Automatically CC yourself on every outgoing mail
settingsView.spellCheckDesc: Show spelling errors using the browser's spell checker
settingsView.defaultBccDesc: Auto-add BCC on every outgoing mail (empty disables it)
settingsView.noTemplates: No saved templates. Save your frequently used replies.
settingsView.blockedSendersDesc: Mail from blocked addresses or domains (@example.com) is auto-marked as spam.
settingsView.vacEnabledDesc: Automatically reply to mail received during this period
settingsView.subject: Subject
settingsView.vacBodyPlaceholder: Hello, I'm currently out of office and unable to check email...
settingsView.themeModeDesc: Light, dark, or auto based on system setting
settingsView.accentDesc: Used for buttons, links, and selection.
settingsView.fontSizeBodyDesc: Default font size across the mail list and UI
settingsView.highContrastDesc: Increase contrast between text and background for readability
settingsView.reducedMotionDesc: Minimize transition animations and motion effects
settingsView.fontFamilyDesc: Font family used across the UI
settingsView.largerClickTargetsDesc: Enlarge click areas for buttons and links for easier interaction
settingsView.screenReaderModeDesc: Enhance ARIA labels and live regions for assistive technology
settingsView.revokeAllConfirm: Sign out of all devices? Your current session will also end.
settingsView.revokeFailed: Failed to revoke sessions. Please try again.
settingsView.pushRegisterFailed: Failed to register push device. Polling-based mail notifications will continue to work.
settingsView.mfaEnabledDesc: An authenticator code is required at sign-in.
settingsView.mfaDisabledDesc: Enable an extra authentication layer using a TOTP app.
settingsView.mfaScanInstructions: Scan the QR code below with an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) or enter the secret key manually.
settingsView.mfaSixDigitLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
settingsView.mfaCodesIntro: MFA enabled. Store these recovery codes in a safe place. Use them if you lose access to your authenticator app.
settingsView.mfaDisableWarning: Disabling two-factor authentication will allow sign-in with only a password. Continue?
settingsView.currentSessionDesc: Your current browser session. Signing out of all devices ends other active sessions as well.
settingsView.revokeAllDesc: Immediately ends all active sessions including this device

composeFull.subject: Subject
composeFull.signatureHint: Changes apply to the next message you compose
composeFull.alreadyScheduled: Send already pending. Cancel and try again.
composeFull.errSchedulePast: Scheduled time must be in the future.
composeFull.errAttachmentChanged: Attachment state changed; scheduled send was cancelled. Please verify and send again.
composeFull.draftPreserved: {message} The draft is preserved and can be sent again.
composeFull.draftPrepFailed: Failed to prepare draft for sending.
composeFull.sendNotStarted: {message} Send was not started. Check the content and save or send again.
composeFull.scheduleHelp: Scheduled send must be in the future.

login.emptyFieldsError: Please enter your email and password.
login.mfaRecoveryHint: Enter one of the recovery codes saved with your account.
login.mfaCodeHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.checkEmailBody: We have sent a password reset link to your inbox. Please check your mail.
forgotPassword.instructions: Enter the email address used at sign-up and we will send a password reset link.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.tokenInvalid: Invalid or expired token. Please request a new link from the forgot-password page.
resetPassword.minLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.

mailPage.mustChangePassword: For security, please change your password.
mailPage.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
mailPage.sessionExpiresIn: Your session will expire in {mins} min.
mailPage.offline: You are offline. Check your network connection.

readingPaneHelpers.smartReply1: I will check my schedule and get back to you.
readingPaneHelpers.smartReply4: I will look into it and reply.
readingPaneHelpers.smartReply9: Let me review further and get back to you.

settingsNotif.browserDenied: Notifications blocked — change in browser settings
settingsNotif.browserPrompt: Show a desktop notification when new mail arrives
settingsNotif.desktopDesc: Mirror in-app notifications to the operating system when allowed
settingsNotif.desktopDeniedDesc: Keep the app preference ready; browser settings must allow notifications first
settingsNotif.soundDesc: Play a sound when new mail arrives
settingsNotif.detailDesc: Choose how much info to show in notifications
settingsNotif.badgeDesc: Choose what count appears in the browser title and favicon
settingsNotif.dndTimeDesc: Start and end time to suppress notifications
settingsNotif.folderDesc: Notify when new unread mail arrives in this folder

settingsAbout.exportIntro: Save settings as a JSON file or import from another device. Filters, blocklists, templates and all preferences are included.
settingsAbout.exportDesc: Save all current settings to a JSON file
settingsAbout.importDesc: Load settings from gogomail-settings.json. Current settings will be replaced.
settingsAbout.importInvalid: Invalid settings file. Check the JSON format and contents.
settingsAbout.importReadFailed: Could not read the settings file. Please select again.

settingsPrivacy.trackingPixelDesc: Block 1×1 tracking images in messages. Senders cannot tell when you read them.
settingsPrivacy.linkPreviewDesc: Show a preview when hovering over a link.
settingsPrivacy.readReceiptDesc: Automatically request read receipts on sent mail.
settingsPrivacy.followUpDesc: Get reminded when sent mail has no reply after the chosen time.
settingsPrivacy.telemetryDesc: GoGoMail does not collect or send user data to external servers.

compose.savePromptScheduled: Save as draft (including schedule) before closing?

browser.enableHint: Get desktop alerts when new mail arrives or events trigger.
browser.deniedHint: Allow notifications for this site in your browser settings to receive desktop alerts.
